Good Health and Well-being.reason: A very tenuous link to mental well-being (Target 3.4) is inferred from the goal to 'establish good interpersonal relationships' (建立良好的人際關係).

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it directly provides tertiary education (Target 4.3) and promotes appreciation of cultural diversity through '認識日本文化' (understand Japanese culture) (Target 4.7).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: Builds capacity for global partnership (Target 17.16) and knowledge sharing (Target 17.6) by teaching a foreign language and promoting cross-cultural understanding ('認識日本文化').
